ops.text: Nuke and Recreate speedster.sh with corrected Bash syntax and spaces

ops.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🚀 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

# Directories
WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

# 1. Download Tools if missing
if [ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget https://dl.google.com/dl/android/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler-hosted/1.5.14/compiler-hosted-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

# 2. Build Giga-Classpath
echo "🔗 Building Classpath from Armory..."
if [ ! -d "$LIBS_DIR" ]; then
    echo "❌ ERROR: $LIBS_DIR not found. Run './gradlew app:harvestDeps' first!"
    exit 1
fi

CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')

if [ -z "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT" ]; then
    ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
fi
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 3. PHASE 2: The Forge (Compile to .class)
echo "⚔️ FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
$WORKDIR/kotlinc/bin/kotlinc dynamic_src/ \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

# 4. PHASE 3: The Crunch (Dexing)
echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "✅ PAYLOAD READY: $DEX_DIR/classes.dex"

operations.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🚀 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

# Directories
WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

# 1. Download Tools if missing
if [ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget https://dl.google.com/dl/android/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler-hosted/1.5.14/compiler-hosted-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

# 2. Build Giga-Classpath
echo "🔗 Building Classpath from Armory..."
if [ ! -d "$LIBS_DIR" ]; then
    echo "❌ ERROR: $LIBS_DIR not found. Run './gradlew app:harvestDeps' first!"
    exit 1
fi

CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')

if [ -z "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT" ]; then
    ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
fi
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

# 3. PHASE 2: The Forge (Compile to .class)
echo "⚔️ FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
$WORKDIR/kotlinc/bin/kotlinc dynamic_src/ \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

# 4. PHASE 3: The Crunch (Dexing)
echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "✅ PAYLOAD READY: $DEX_DIR/classes.dex"

ops.text: Fix CRLF line ending issues and modernize bash syntax in speedster

ops.find_block:
- name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh
ops.replace_with:
- name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          sed -i 's/\r$//' speedster.sh
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

operations.find_block:
- name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh
operations.replace_with:
- name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          sed -i 's/\r$//' speedster.sh
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

ops.text: Fix missing resources by using system icons and fix lazy dependency harvesting

ops.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_gallery"
        android:label="Speedster"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@android:style/Theme.DeviceDefault.NoActionBar">

        <service
            android:name="com.speedster.SpeedsterTileService"
            android:exported="true"
            android:label="Nuke Speedster"
            android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_delete"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_QUICK_SETTINGS_TILE">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.service.quicksettings.action.QS_TILE" />
            </intent-filter>
        </service>

        <activity
            android:name="com.speedster.MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:theme="@android:style/Theme.DeviceDefault.NoActionBar">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

    </application>
</manifest>

operations.content:

        <service

            </intent-filter>
        </service>

        <activity

            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

    </application>
</manifest>

ops.text: Fix CI/CD header overlap and implement Build Trigger with autocomplete suggestions

ops.find_block: .header { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-shrink: 0; gap: 12px; }
ops.replace_with:
.header { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-shrink: 0; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .header span:first-child { flex: 1; min-width: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

Trigger Workflow

This will trigger a repository dispatch event on GitHub. Make sure your workflow file exists in the target branch.
